'''Boganni Hrul''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] who represented [[Ord Thoden]] and [[Dynali sector/Legends|Dynali sector]] in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] during the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]].

==Appearances==
*{{HoloNetNewsWeb|46|jediwatch/1337_1.html|Jedi Refuse to Hand Over Baby Ludi}} {{1st}}
